summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mitti Basket cart system and festive 'Coming Soon' feature. Backend API tests (9/9 passed) verified POST /api/orders endpoint works correctly with MongoDB persistence and Google Sheets integration. Frontend tests verified: festive products show 'Coming Soon' badge and disabled cart, season harvest products show 'Add to Cart' with quantity selector, cart drawer functionality (add/remove/quantity adjustment), checkout form with all required fields.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint returns 200 with correct message
Backend: POST /api/orders creates order with single item
Backend: POST /api/orders creates order with multiple items
Backend: POST /api/orders works without optional email
Backend: POST /api/orders returns 422 for missing required fields (phone, name)
Backend: POST /api/orders accepts empty items array
Backend: Waitlist API regression tests pass
Frontend: Festive products (Thekua, Tilkut, Khajur Sweets) show 'COMING SOON' badge
Frontend: Festive product hover shows 'COMING SOON' pill, options do NOT expand
Frontend: Season harvest products show 'ADD TO CART' pill on hover
Frontend: Hovering on 'Add to Cart' pill expands options (qty selector, add to cart button)
Frontend: Clicking 'Add to Cart' adds item to cart
Frontend: Cart icon in navbar shows count badge after adding items
Frontend: Cart drawer opens when clicking cart icon
Frontend: Cart drawer shows items with image, name, qty controls, remove, price
Frontend: Cart quantity adjustment works (increase/decrease updates subtotal)
Frontend: Cart remove item works (cart shows empty state)
Frontend: Proceed to Checkout shows delivery details form
Frontend: Checkout form has all required fields (Name, Phone*, Email, Address, Pincode)
Frontend: Village Pantry products (subscribable) show 'Add to Cart' on hover
Frontend: Homepage festive section shows 'Coming Soon' on product cards
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Playwright click() method has issues with the ProductCard options panel due to hover state management. Using page.evaluate() to trigger click events directly works reliably.
The cart uses sessionStorage which is cleared on new browser sessions - this is expected behavior for session persistence.
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website with cart functionality
seed_data_creation: None - using existing product data from /app/frontend/src/data/products.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart system fully implemented and tested. Key testing notes: 1) Use page.evaluate() to click Add to Cart buttons due to hover state management in ProductCard. 2) Festive products have comingSoon: true which disables cart functionality. 3) Backend /api/orders endpoint saves to MongoDB and forwards to Google Sheets. 4) WhatsApp integration uses wa.me URL links (opens in new tab). 5) Cart persists in sessionStorage with key 'mitti_basket_cart'.
